_comment: Per-player per-stat post-calibration multipliers (flat_corrections) and role/minutes overrides (players). flat_corrections: residual corrections applied AFTER role-stratified corrections. players: role_bucket_override and minutes_mean_override applied pre-calibration. Computed: 2026-07-06. Recalibrate weekly. Updated Phase 6: Malonga form correction raised; global bias updated to role-weighted.

736._note: Minutes model predicts 11.8 due to DNP row in BDL; 2026 avg: 31.4 min, 16.4 pts, 3.9 reb, 2.9 ast

758._note: 8 early-season DNPs followed by starter-level production (37 pts, 28 pts). Role override prevents inactive_risk classification.

373._note: Model predicts 21 min / rotation due to feature corruption. Market lines pts=15.5/reb=7.5/ast=8.5 confirm starter-level production. Force starter role and 32 min override.
